stories.title: Embiid Drops 33, 76ers Stun Celtics at TD Garden to Stay Alive

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Embiid: 33 PTS, 8 AST — 18 of those in the second half.

76ers outscored Boston 28-11 in the 4th. TD Garden went silent.

Sixers win 113-97. Series is 3-2. Game 6 Thursday in Philly. 🔥

#Sixers #Celtics #NBAPlayoffs

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Maxey: 25 PTS, 10 REB.
Embiid: 33 PTS, 8 AST.
George: 16 PTS.
Grimes: 18 PTS.

All four Sixers contributors went off as Philly came back from 13 down to stun Boston.

Game 6 Thursday in Philadelphia. #Sixers

stories.title: Raptors Stun Cavs — Can Toronto Pull Off the Ultimate Upset?

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Every game in the Cavs-Raptors series has been won by the road team.

Toronto won Games 3 & 4 IN CLEVELAND. Now they go back home tied 2-2.

Game 5 tonight at 7:30 PM ET.

Can the Raptors pull it off? #Raptors #NBAPlayoffs
